attributes.action: Close the airspace and air bases to all US military aircrafts and carriers.
attributes.additional_details: Close the airspace and airbases to use on US military. As  committing war crimes openly
attributes.background: The US has been targeting  a country’s infrastructure as well as world heritage sites and medical research centres which all constitute war crimes. Therefore a ban on use of  UK’s  airspace and all its airbases should be applied to all US military carriers

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Stop allowing the US to use British bases for any action against Iran
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762916
